{{CargoRelic
|name=Potara Manual
|class_id=20953
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=A Relic from the Second Rezero War, capable of combining several individuals into a powerful warrior. The stronger the warrior, the shorter the fusion time, and vice versa. Later, this manual was seemingly obtained by the cockroach tribe.
|fame=32
|art=15
|fth=18
|civ=13
|tech=12
|ss1=Hellas Union Impact DMG +1%<br>Per 1,000 Hellas Disciples advanced, Snail ATK +3<br>Hellas Disciples Advanced: 20000/20000
|ss2=Hellas Union Impact DMG +2%<br>Per 1,000 Hellas Disciples advanced, Snail ATK +6<br>Hellas Disciples Advanced: 20000/20000
|ss3=Hellas Union Impact DMG +3%<br>Per 1,000 Hellas Disciples advanced, Snail ATK +9<br>Hellas Disciples Advanced: 20000/20000
|ss4=Hellas Union Impact DMG +3%<br>Per 1,000 Hellas Disciples advanced, Snail ATK +9<br>Hellas Disciples Advanced: 20000/20000
|ss7=Hellas Union Impact DMG +3%<br>Per 1,000 Hellas Disciples advanced, Snail ATK +9<br>Hellas Disciples Advanced: 20000/20000<br> (Awakened)
}}
